description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:8 Docker image and caches the directories node_modules/, ${HOME}/.cache/yarn and ${HOME}/.npm. Define two stages: test and publish. Add a job called All tests in the test stage that runs a before_script of 'yarn install --freeze-lockfile' and then executes the script 'yarn test'. Add a job called Publish to npm in the publish stage that also runs 'yarn install --freeze-lockfile' in before_script, then runs the scripts 'yarn build' and '$(yarn bin)/npm-publish-git-tag', and configure it to run only on Git tags. Ensure the cache paths are applied to both jobs.
